qa_matrix.question_text: Kindly share your current location( City and state with country)?

You Jithin Abraham , declar e that, you have fully understood the questions ask ed to you as per this call and have furnished complete, true and accurate infor mation af ter fully understanding the same. Sir/Mam' ar e you in agr eement with the declaration that I have r ead out to you.
qa_matrix.captured_response: You hereby declare and agree that particulars and answers to the above questions are complete and true and these responses will form a part of the policy records.

qa_matrix.question_text: In the last 24 months, have you smoked or used any tobacco or nicotine products?
Do you consume alcohol ?
Have you ever been advised by a doctor to reduce or stop alcohol consumption ?
Have you ever used recreational drugs or Narcotics that was not prescribed by a Licensed physician ?
What is Proposed insured height (cm)?
What is Proposed Insured weight (kg)?
High/Low blood pressure, raised cholesterol or triglycerides or lipids

Chest pain or heaviness or discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, Heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, shortness of breath or any other heart conditions
Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sacroma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths
Diabetes, raised blood sugar or sugar in urine,Hyperthyroidism, Hypothyroidism , other thyroid disorders, or any other endocrine disorders
Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease (COPD) or any other respiratory disorders
Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or any other diseases or disorders of the liver
Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus or any other diseases or disorders of the blood or autoimmune disease

Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limb, stroke, transient ischemic attack (TIA), multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, Dementia, Alzheimer's or any other neurological, nervous, mental health disorders?

Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcera-tive colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders

Recurrent Back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophies, deformity, physical disability or any other disorders of muscle, bones, joints, limbs or spine?

qa_matrix.question_text: Is there anything else that you would like to share with us with respect to your health/ habits or anything else that you believe is important to ensure that policy is processed basis all facts & information?
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, currently nothing. I am an actively fit person. So, there are no other issues currently.

qa_matrix.question_text: Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or pre-scribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endo-scopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test

qa_matrix.question_text: Have you suffered from any congenital defect or disorder or hereditary disease such as cerebral palsy, Down's syndrome, poliomyelitis
Have you or your spouse or partner been told to undergo tests or treatment, or received any medical advice or counselling in connection with sexually transmitted diseases, including HIV and AIDS?

Apart from what you have disclosed, are you experiencing any unexplained weight loss/gain or any sign/symptoms that you are likely to seek medical advice or treatment for or awaiting any surgical procedure.

recommendations: Ensure the doctor reads the declaration statement verbatim as per the MER document to avoid 'Paraphrased' status, even if the meaning is similar.

Review MER document for minor typographical errors to ensure accuracy (e.g., 'ulcera-tive colitis' should be 'ulcerative colitis', 'difficult in swal-lowing' should be 'difficulty in swallowing', 'pre-scribed' should be 'prescribed', 'Endo-scopy/Colonoscopy' should be 'Endoscopy/Colonoscopy', 'two 2 consecutive weeks' should be 'two consecutive weeks').

customer_satisfaction_indicators: Customer actively participates in the verification process (e.g., full body view).

video_analysis.attire_explanation: The doctor is wearing a white clinical apron/coat, visible in all frames.
video_analysis.visibility_explanation: Both the doctor (left panel) and the customer (right panel) are clearly visible in all provided frames.
video_analysis.privacy_explanation: The doctor's background is blurred, and no private boards, files, monitors with confidential data, or identifiable patients are visible. No privacy breaches are observed in the doctor's background.

greetings.explanation: The doctor initiated the call with a greeting.

call_opening.explanation: The doctor introduced herself, stated the insurer's name, and confirmed the client's full name.

language_preference.explanation: The doctor confirmed the customer's primary language.

id_validation.explanation: The doctor asked the customer to show their ID card and read out the last four digits of their Aadhaar.

disclaimer.explanation: The doctor clearly stated that the call was being recorded for audit purposes and explained the implications of providing incorrect information.

politeness.explanation: The doctor used polite language ('please', 'can you please'), thanked the customer, and checked on them after a call disconnection.

empathy.explanation: No serious health concerns (accident, operation, severe illness) were reported by the customer that would require specific empathy. The customer stated being an 'actively fit person'.

communication_skills.explanation: The doctor provided clear instructions for the full view verification and prefaced a sensitive question politely, demonstrating good communication.

probing.explanation: The doctor asked comprehensive and detailed questions across various health and lifestyle categories, ensuring thorough information gathering.

observations.explanation: There was no customer hesitation (refusal, no answer, or repeated evasion) or third-party prompting observed during the call.

call_closure.explanation: The doctor read the declaration statement and concluded the call with a thank you.
